description: Fix intervention detail display to correctly handle all 3 scheduling modes (fixed, slots, flexible). Currently flexible mode shows misleading 'En attente' on General tab and 'Aucun creneau propose' on Planning tab instead of appropriate contextual messages.

userStories.title: Add schedulingType to shared types and InterventionDetailsCard
userStories.description: As a developer, I want schedulingType to be available in InterventionDetailsCardProps.planning so that the PlanningStatusSection can adapt its display per scheduling mode.
userStories.notes: Added schedulingType to both InterventionDetailsCardProps.planning and PlanningCardProps

userStories.title: Handle flexible mode in PlanningStatusSection (General tab)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, when scheduling_type is 'flexible', I want the General tab 'Planning et Estimations' section to show 'Coordination autonome' with an emerald badge instead of 'En attente', so I understand the planning mode is intentional.
acceptanceCriteria: When schedulingType='flexible': icon is Users (emerald), label is 'Coordination autonome', description shows 'Les participants s'organisent entre eux'
When schedulingType='fixed' or 'slots': existing behavior unchanged
When schedulingType is null: existing 'En attente' behavior unchanged
userStories.notes: Added Users import, new schedulingType param to getPlanningStatusConfig, emerald flexible case in default branch

userStories.title: Handle flexible mode in PlanningCard (Planning tab)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, when scheduling_type is 'flexible' and I navigate to the Planning tab, I want to see a contextual message explaining that participants coordinate autonomously, instead of 'Aucun creneau propose' with a 'Proposer un creneau' button.
acceptanceCriteria: When schedulingType='flexible': shows emerald card with 'Coordination autonome' message (reusing InterventionSchedulingPreview pattern)
When schedulingType='flexible': hides 'Proposer un creneau' button
When schedulingType is not 'flexible': existing slot-based behavior unchanged
userStories.notes: Added Users import, schedulingType destructured, ternary empty state for flexible vs slots, header button hidden for flexible

userStories.title: Pass scheduling_type from intervention-detail-client to components
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the intervention-detail-client.tsx to pass the intervention's scheduling_type to both InterventionDetailsCard and PlanningCard so the UI adapts.
acceptanceCriteria: InterventionDetailsCard receives schedulingType in its planning prop
All 3 modes display correctly on both General and Planning tabs
npm run lint passes with no new errors
userStories.notes: Wired schedulingType to all 6 call sites: gestionnaire, locataire, prestataire x (InterventionDetailsCard + PlanningCard). lint passes.
